title: Nausea in pregnancy follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Specifies distinction between nausea, vomiting, retching, and regurgitation and records duration, frequency, associated symptoms, intake, and likely causes.
presenting_history.rationale: Supports direct Dubai virtual assessment of entered nausea, vomiting, intake, hydration and associated symptoms.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Specifies distinction between nausea, vomiting, retching, and regurgitation and records duration, frequency, associated symptoms, intake, and likely causes.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08

red_flags.text: Lists severe abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, neurological symptoms, chest pain, weight loss, dehydration, altered state, and metabolic concerns.
red_flags.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed dehydration and other concern features without inferring severity.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists severe abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, neurological symptoms, chest pain, weight loss, dehydration, altered state, and metabolic concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08

red_flags.text: Lists urgent referral features including haematemesis, neurological symptoms, chest pain, acute abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, and immunosuppression.
red_flags.rationale: Supports clinician-decided referral and follow-up only.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists urgent referral features including haematemesis, neurological symptoms, chest pain, acute abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, and immunosuppression.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08

source_limitations: Gestation, pregnancy location, severity, hydration, weight, results and treatment are absent.
No hyperemesis diagnosis, medicine, fluid plan, admission or referral is generated.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
